docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY VENKATRAMAN, MAYA AS TO DEFENDANT 10TH AND MARKET LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VENKATRAMAN, MAYA AS TO DEFENDANT 10TH AND MARKET LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-14-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 10TH AND MARKET LLC
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF VENKATRAMAN, MAYA
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE THE COURT AND THE DEFENDANT EXHIBITS/DOCUMENTS TO JUN-27-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAYA VENTRAKAMAN IS PRESENT (ZOOM). DEFENDANT 10TH AND MARKET LLC (JUSTIN BELL) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JUSTIN BELL FILED BY DEFENDANT 10TH AND MARKET LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. PLAINTIFF MAYA VENKATRAMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT10TH AND MARKET LLC (JUSTIN BELL) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF VENKATRAMAN, MAYA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JUSTIN BELL FILED BY DEFENDANT 10TH AND MARKET LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VENKATRAMAN, MAYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 10TH AND MARKET LLC $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $139.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $239.50, STATUTORY DAMAGES PER CIVIL CODE 1950.5(N) FOR DELAY IN RETURNING TENANTS SECURITY DEPOSIT W/O GOOD CAUSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
